```{r, fig.height=20, fig.width=18}
# ConservationScatterFlipped(conserved.neurotransmitters)
plot_grid(
  TitlePlot(ConservationScatterFlipped(conserved.neurotransmitters), 'Neurotransmission') + PlainXAxis(), 
    geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, 'GAD2') + PlainXAxis() + NoLegend(), 
    geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, 'SLC6A9') + PlainXAxis() + PlainYAxis() + NoLegend(),
  TitlePlot(ConservationScatterFlipped(conserved.tfs), 'Transcription factors') + PlainXAxis(), 
    geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, 'MEIS2') + PlainXAxis() + NoLegend(), 
    geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, 'TCF4') + PlainXAxis() + PlainYAxis() + NoLegend(),
  TitlePlot(ConservationScatterFlipped(conserved.neuropeptides), 'Neuropeptides') + PlainXAxis(), 
    geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, 'NXPH1') + PlainXAxis() + NoLegend(), 
    geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, 'NXPH2') + PlainXAxis() + PlainYAxis() + NoLegend(),
  TitlePlot(ConservationScatterFlipped(conserved.adhesion), 'Adhesion molecules') + PlainXAxis(),
    geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, 'PTPRM') + PlainXAxis() + NoLegend(), 
    geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, 'PTPRF') + PlainXAxis() + PlainYAxis() + NoLegend(),
  TitlePlot(ConservationScatterFlipped(conserved.connexins), 'Connexins'), 
    geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, 'GJC1') + NoLegend(), 
    geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, 'GJD2') + PlainYAxis() + NoLegend(),
  ncol = 3, nrow = 5, rel_heights = c(1,1,1,1,1.1), rel_widths = c(0.8,1.2,1), 
  labels = LETTERS)

ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/fig5_genetic-characterization-dotplots.pdf', height=20, width=18)
```

## Show conserved genes

Dotplots aren't great because of the averaging across species, even the technique used in Hahn et al. is dependent on the percentage threshold. Use heatmap and show all species!

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=9}
ac.ortho.ds = DownsampleSeurat(ac.ortho, group.by = c('type', 'species'), size = 50)
table(ac.ortho.ds$species, ac.ortho.ds$type)

# Test
ClusteredDotplot2(ac.ortho, 
                  features = c('GBX2', 'TCF4', 'NOS1', 'DDC', 'TH', 'EOMES'), 
                  group.by = 'type', 
                  cluster_rows = FALSE,
                  max.pct = 40, 
                  dot.scale.factor = 0.6, 
                  pseudocount = 5, 
                  rotate = FALSE, 
                  show.legend = TRUE, 
                  show_row_names = TRUE, 
                  show_row_dend = FALSE, 
                  border_gp = gpar(col = "black", lwd = 1),
                  column_names_side = 'top', 
                  species.size = 0.2)

ClusteredDotplot2(ac.ortho, 
                  features = c('GBX2', 'TCF4', 'NOS1', 'DDC', 'TH', 'EOMES'), 
                  group.by = 'type', 
                  cluster_rows = FALSE,
                  max.pct = 40, 
                  dot.scale.factor = 0.35, 
                  pseudocount = 5, 
                  rotate = FALSE, 
                  show.legend = TRUE, 
                  show_row_names = TRUE, 
                  show_row_dend = FALSE, 
                  border_gp = gpar(col = "black", lwd = 1),
                  column_names_side = 'top')

ClusteredDotplot2(ac.ortho.ds, 
                  features = head(conserved.neurotransmitters$gene, 15), 
                  group.by = 'type', 
                  cluster_rows = FALSE,
                  max.pct = 40, 
                  dot.scale.factor = 0.5, 
                  pseudocount = 5, 
                  rotate = FALSE, 
                  show.legend = FALSE, 
                  show_row_names = TRUE, 
                  show_row_dend = FALSE, 
                  border_gp = gpar(col = "black", lwd = 1),
                  column_names_side = 'top')
```

Perhaps a heatmap is more appropriate? 

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=13}
genes.plot = list(neurotransmitter = head(conserved.neurotransmitters$gene, 15), 
                  neuropeptides = head(conserved.neuropeptides$gene, 6), 
                  tfs = head(conserved.tfs$gene, 15), 
                  adhesion = head(conserved.adhesion$gene, 12), 
                  connexin = head(conserved.connexins$gene, 2)
                  )

pdf('../../figures/my_figs/conserved-genes-heatmap.pdf', height = 7, width = 12)
ConservationHeatmap(genes.plot$neurotransmitter, show_heatmap_legend = FALSE, row_names_side = 'left') +
ConservationHeatmap(genes.plot$neuropeptides, show_heatmap_legend = FALSE, row_names_side = 'left') +
ConservationHeatmap(genes.plot$tfs, show_heatmap_legend = FALSE, row_names_side = 'left') +
ConservationHeatmap(genes.plot$adhesion, show_heatmap_legend = FALSE, row_names_side = 'left') + 
ConservationHeatmap(genes.plot$connexin, show_heatmap_legend = FALSE, row_names_side = 'left')
dev.off()
```

# Figure 7: similarity to RGCs

## Diversity correlation analysis

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=12}
# Just metadata
metaList = ReadSAMapObjects(new.lamprey = TRUE, nonmammals = TRUE, mammals = TRUE, mouse = TRUE, new = FALSE, metadata = TRUE)
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=12}
# Tabulate the number of ACs
nTypes.df = data.frame(species = names(metaList))

# Number of clusters
nTypes.df$AC.clusters = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  length(unique(subset(meta, cell_class == 'AC')$annotated))
  })

nTypes.df$gabaAC.clusters = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  length(unique(subset(meta, cell_class2 == 'gabaAC')$annotated))
  })

nTypes.df$glyAC.clusters = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  length(unique(subset(meta, cell_class2 == 'glyAC')$annotated))
  })

nTypes.df$RGC.clusters = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  length(unique(subset(meta, cell_class == 'RGC')$annotated))
  })

nTypes.df$BC.clusters = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  length(unique(subset(meta, cell_class == 'BC')$annotated))
  })

# Simpson index
nTypes.df$AC.simpson = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  SimpsonIndex(table(subset(meta, cell_class == 'AC')$annotated), invert = T)
  })

nTypes.df$gabaAC.simpson = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  SimpsonIndex(table(subset(meta, cell_class == 'gabaAC')$annotated), invert = T)
  })

nTypes.df$glyAC.simpson = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  SimpsonIndex(table(subset(meta, cell_class == 'glyAC')$annotated), invert = T)
  })

nTypes.df$RGC.simpson = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  SimpsonIndex(table(subset(meta, cell_class == 'RGC')$annotated), invert = T)
  })

nTypes.df$BC.simpson = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  SimpsonIndex(table(subset(meta, cell_class == 'BC')$annotated), invert = T)
  })

# Tabulate the number of cells found to assess sampling bias
nTypes.df$AC.cells = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  nrow(subset(meta, cell_class == 'AC'))
  })

nTypes.df$RGC.cells = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  nrow(subset(meta, cell_class == 'RGC'))
  })

nTypes.df$BC.cells = sapply(metaList, function(meta) {
  nrow(subset(meta, cell_class == 'BC'))
  })

# Fix macaque
nTypes.df$AC.clusters[nTypes.df$species == 'Macaque'] = 44

# Well-sampled species (12)
cell.threshold = 3000
ws.df = subset(nTypes.df, AC.cells > cell.threshold & RGC.cells > cell.threshold)
saveRDS(ws.df, 'metadata/ws.df.rds')

# Remove killifish if included
# ws.df = subset(ws.df, species != 'Killifish')
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=4}
ws.df = readRDS('metadata/ws.df.rds')
this_theme = function(){ theme_cowplot(font_family = 'ArialMT')}

# Main figure
ScatterPlot(ws.df, 
            x = 'RGC.clusters', 
            y = 'AC.clusters', 
            lm = T, 
            r_pval = F, 
            labels = 'species',
            max.overlaps = 100, 
            xlab = '# of RGC clusters', 
            ylab = '# of AC clusters', 
            fill = 'species', 
            pt.size = 2, label.size = 3.5, box.padding = 0.6) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = lighten(species_palette3, 0.3)) + 
  # scale_x_break(c(0, 15), scales = 1.5) + 
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0,50), ylim = c(0, 70), expand = 0)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 60, length.out = 4))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 45, length.out = 4))+
  # scale_ticks_first_last() +
  # scale_ticks_first_last(axis = 'x') +
  theme_cowplot() + 
  ArialFont() +
  NoLegend() 

# ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/fig-ac-rgc-cor-main.pdf', width = 3.5, height = 3.5)
```

```{r}
ws.df = readRDS('metadata/ws.df.rds')
ws.df$species = species_names_pretty(ws.df$species)
rownames(ws.df) = ws.df$species
dendro = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/phylo.hs.pm.sorted.dendro.rds')
# pruned = prune(dendro, setdiff(labels(dendro), levels(summary.cor$Species)))
tree = as.phylo(dendro)
plot(tree)
# tree$tip.label = species_names_pretty(tree$tip.label)
pruned = drop.tip(tree, setdiff(tree$tip.label, ws.df$species))
plot(pruned)

library(phylolm)
fit <- phylolm(BC.clusters ~ RGC.clusters, data = ws.df, phy = pruned, model = "lambda")
summary(fit)

# fit_null <- phylolm(RGC.clusters ~ AC.clusters, 
#                     data = ws.df, phy = pruned, 
#                     model = "BM")
# 
# summary(fit_null)
```


```{r}
# Run all the comparisons through phylolm
comparisons = list(c('RGC.clusters', 'AC.clusters'), 
                   c('BC.clusters', 'AC.clusters'), 
                   c('BC.clusters', 'RGC.clusters'), 
                   c('RGC.simpson', 'AC.simpson'), 
                   c('BC.simpson', 'AC.simpson'), 
                   c('BC.simpson', 'RGC.simpson'), 
                   c('AC.cells', 'AC.clusters'), 
                   c('RGC.cells', 'RGC.clusters'), 
                   c('BC.cells', 'BC.clusters'))

pgls = do.call(rbind, lapply(comparisons, function(comparison){
  message("trying comparsion ", paste0(comparison, collapse = ', '))
  # browser()
  fit <- phylolm(eval(parse(text = comparison[[1]])) ~ eval(parse(text = comparison[[2]])),
                 data = ws.df, 
                 phy = pruned, 
                 model = "lambda")
  mod_summary = summary(fit)
  pval = mod_summary$coefficients[, "p.value"][[2]]
  r.squared = mod_summary$r.squared
  data.frame(comparison = paste0(comparison, collapse = '-'), 
             pval = pval, 
             r.squared = r.squared)
}))

pgls <- results %>%
  mutate(label_text = case_when(
    pval < 0.001 ~ paste0("R^2 == ", round(r.squared, 2), 
                          "* ',' ~ italic(p) == ", 
                          # Convert 1.2e-04 to 1.2 %*% 10^-4
                          gsub("e", " %*% 10^", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 2))),
    TRUE         ~ paste0("R^2 == ", round(r.squared, 2), 
                          "* ',' ~ italic(p) == ", round(pval, 2))
  ))

pgls
```



```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=12}
this_theme = function(){ theme_cowplot(font_family = 'ArialMT')}


# Number of clusters
p1 <- ScatterPlot(ws.df, x = 'RGC.clusters', y = 'AC.clusters', lm = F, r_pval = F, labels = 'species', max.overlaps = 100, 
                  xlab = '# of RGC clusters', ylab = '# of AC clusters', fill = 'species', pt.size = 2) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = lighten(species_palette3, 0.3)) + theme_cowplot() + ArialFont() +
  geom_text(data = pgls[1,], aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label_text), hjust=1.1, vjust=-0.5, parse = TRUE, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE) + NoLegend()

p2 <- ScatterPlot(ws.df, x = 'BC.clusters', y = 'AC.clusters', lm = F, r_pval = F, labels = 'species', max.overlaps = 100, 
                  xlab = '# of BC clusters', ylab = '# of AC clusters', fill = 'species', pt.size = 2) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = lighten(species_palette3, 0.3)) + this_theme() +
  geom_text(data = pgls[2,], aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label_text), hjust=1.1, vjust=-0.5, parse = TRUE, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE) + NoLegend()

p3 <- ScatterPlot(ws.df, x = 'BC.clusters', y = 'RGC.clusters', lm = F, r_pval = F, labels = 'species', max.overlaps = 100, 
                  xlab = '# of BC clusters', ylab = '# of RGC clusters', fill = 'species', pt.size = 2) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = lighten(species_palette3, 0.3)) + this_theme() + 
  geom_text(data = pgls[3,], aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label_text), hjust=1.1, vjust=-0.5, parse = TRUE, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE) + NoLegend()

p1 | p2 | p3
ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/fig-ac-rgc-bc-cor.pdf', width = 10.5, height = 3.5)



# Simpson index
p4 <- ScatterPlot(ws.df, x = 'RGC.simpson', y = 'AC.simpson', lm = F, r_pval = F, labels = 'species', max.overlaps = 100, 
                  xlab = 'RGC Simpson index', ylab = 'AC Simpson index', fill = 'species', pt.size = 2) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = lighten(species_palette3, 0.3)) + this_theme() +
  geom_text(data = pgls[4,], aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label_text), hjust=1.1, vjust=-0.5, parse = TRUE, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE) + NoLegend()

p5 <- ScatterPlot(ws.df, x = 'BC.simpson', y = 'AC.simpson', lm = F, r_pval = F, labels = 'species', max.overlaps = 100, 
                  xlab = 'BC Simpson index', ylab = 'AC Simpson index', fill = 'species', pt.size = 2) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = lighten(species_palette3, 0.3)) + this_theme() +
  geom_text(data = pgls[5,], aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label_text), hjust=1.1, vjust=-0.5, parse = TRUE, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE) + NoLegend()

p6 <- ScatterPlot(ws.df, x = 'BC.simpson', y = 'RGC.simpson', lm = F, r_pval = F, labels = 'species', max.overlaps = 100, 
                  xlab = 'BC Simpson index', ylab = 'RGC Simpson index', fill = 'species', pt.size = 2) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = lighten(species_palette3, 0.3)) + this_theme() +
  geom_text(data = pgls[6,], aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label_text), hjust=1.1, vjust=-0.5, parse = TRUE, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE) + NoLegend()

p4 | p5 | p6
ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/fig-ac-rgc-bc-simpson.pdf', width = 10.5, height = 3.5)



# No stable relationship between # of AC cells and # of RGC cells recovered, suggesting its not simply due to higher sampling of certain species
p7 <- ScatterPlot(ws.df, x = 'AC.cells', y = 'AC.clusters', lm = F, r_pval = F, 
                  xlab = '# of AC cells', ylab = '# of AC clusters', labels = 'species', max.overlaps = 100, logX = TRUE, fill = 'species', pt.size = 2) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = lighten(species_palette3, 0.3)) + theme_cowplot() +
  geom_text(data = pgls[7,], aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label_text), hjust=1.1, vjust=-0.5, parse = TRUE, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE) + NoLegend()

p8 <- ScatterPlot(ws.df, x = 'RGC.cells', y = 'RGC.clusters', lm = F, r_pval = F, 
                  xlab = '# of RGC cells', ylab = '# of RGC clusters', labels = 'species', max.overlaps = 100, logX = TRUE, fill = 'species', pt.size = 2)+ 
  scale_fill_manual(values = lighten(species_palette3, 0.3)) + theme_cowplot() +
  geom_text(data = pgls[8,], aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label_text), hjust=1.1, vjust=-0.5, parse = TRUE, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE) + NoLegend()

p9 <- ScatterPlot(ws.df, x = 'BC.cells', y = 'BC.clusters', lm = F, r_pval = F, 
                  xlab = '# of BC cells', ylab = '# of BC clusters', labels = 'species', max.overlaps = 100, logX = TRUE, fill = 'species', pt.size = 2)+ 
  scale_fill_manual(values = lighten(species_palette3, 0.3)) + theme_cowplot() +
  geom_text(data = pgls[9,], aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label_text), hjust=1.1, vjust=-0.5, parse = TRUE, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE) + NoLegend()

p7 | p8 | p9
ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/fig-ac-rgc-bc-sampling.pdf', width = 10.5, height = 3.5)
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=10}
PrettyUmap2(class.umap, group.by = 'species_full',
                   label = FALSE, geom.label = geom_text_repel,
                   # nudge_x = 2, nudge_y = ,
            show.legend = FALSE,
                   title = 'Colored by species', pt.alpha = 0.1,
                   cols = species_palette2, rasterise = FALSE, 
            nbreaks = 100, remove.times = 2, min.segment.length = 0, box.padding = 1.5) +

  PrettyUmap2(subset(class.umap, species_full != 'Lamprey'), group.by = 'cell_class2',
                   label = TRUE, geom.label = geom_text_repel,
                   # nudge_x = 2, nudge_y = ,
                   title = 'Jawed vertebrates', pt.alpha = 0.1,
                   cols = cell_class3_colors, rasterise = FALSE, 
            nbreaks = 100, remove.times = 2, min.segment.length = 0, box.padding = 1.5) |
  PrettyUmap2(subset(class.umap, species_full == 'Lamprey' & annotated != 'pm_MG-4'), group.by = 'cell_class2',
               label = FALSE, geom.label = geom_text_repel,
```

```{r, fig.height=2.8, fig.width=8}
class.umap = as.data.frame(fread('samap/pm_sh_ca_kf_ze_am_ch_li-acrgc-v1-umap.csv'))
colnames(class.umap) = gsub('UMAP', 'UMAP_', colnames(class.umap))
class.umap$species_full = convert_values(class.umap$species, c(ze = 'Zebrafish', ch = 'Chicken', li = 'Lizard', am = 'Axolotl', ca = 'Goldfish', pm = 'Lamprey', kf = 'Killifish', sh = 'CatShark'))
class.umap$species_full = factor(factor(class.umap$species_full, levels = speciesList))

 PrettyUmap2(class.umap, 
             group.by = 'species_full', show.legend = TRUE, 
             label = FALSE, geom.label = geom_text_repel,
             nudge_y = -2, min.segment.length = 1000, 
             title = 'Integration of ACs and RGCs', pt.alpha = 0.2,
             rasterise = FALSE, nbreaks = 30) + 
    LegendLowerRight(x = 0, y = 0, line.spacing = 0, just = c(0,0)) |

   PrettyUmap2(subset(class.umap, species_full == 'Lamprey'), 
               group.by = 'cell_class2', show.legend = TRUE, 
             label = FALSE, geom.label = geom_text_repel,
             nudge_y = -2, min.segment.length = 1000, 
             title = 'Lamprey', pt.alpha = 0.2,
             cols = cell_class3_colors, rasterise = FALSE, nbreaks = 30) + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) + 
   LegendLowerLeft() | 
 PrettyUmap2(subset(class.umap, species_full != 'Lamprey'),
               group.by = 'cell_class2', show.legend = FALSE,
             label = FALSE, geom.label = geom_text_repel,
             nudge_y = -2, min.segment.length = 1000,
             title = 'Other species', pt.alpha = 0.2,
             cols = cell_class3_colors, rasterise = FALSE, nbreaks = 30) + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
 LegendLowerRight(x = 1, y = 1) 
 ggsave()
```

## RGC scoring barplot

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=13}
bc.ac.rgc.ortho = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/bc.ac.rgc.ortho.rds')
rgc.scores.df = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/rgc.scores.df.rds')
perm.res = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/rgc.score.perm.res.rds')

null.dist = do.call(rbind, lapply(perm.res, function(x) x$results))
null.dist$species = ExtractString(null.dist$species_annotated, after = '-')
PrettyBoxplot2(null.dist, x = 'species', y = 'Cluster6', color = 'species')
PrettyHistogram(null.dist$Cluster6, vline = quantile(null.dist$Cluster6, probs = c(0.025, 0.975)))

# Recompute RGC score? 
# de_list = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/conserved.major.class.genes.list.rds')
# names(de_list) = paste0(names(de_list), '.new')
# head(bc.ac.rgc.ortho$RGC.score)
# rgc.scores.mat = do.call(cbind, lapply(seq_len(10), function(this.seed){
#   temp = CellClassScoring2(bc.ac.rgc.ortho, de_list, verbose = FALSE, seed = this.seed)
#   temp$RGC.new.score
# }))
# saveRDS(rgc.scores.mat, '../../Ortho_Objects/rgc.scores.mat.rds')
rgc.scores.mat = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/rgc.scores.mat.rds')
bc.ac.rgc.ortho$RGC.score = rowMeans(rgc.scores.mat)

rgc.scores.df = MeanMetadata(bc.ac.rgc.ortho, 'species_annotated', 'RGC.score', as.df = TRUE)
rgc.scores.df$species = ExtractString(rgc.scores.df$species_annotated, after = '-')
rgc.scores.df$annotated = factor(ExtractString(rgc.scores.df$species_annotated, before = '-'), levels = levels(bc.ac.rgc.ortho$annotated))
rgc.scores.df$cell_class = factor(bc.ac.rgc.ortho$cell_class[match(rgc.scores.df$species_annotated, bc.ac.rgc.ortho$species_annotated)], levels = c('BC', 'AC', 'RGC'))
head(rgc.scores.df)

# Remove species-type combinations that were not significant
best.jaccard = reshape2::melt(readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/best-jaccard.rds')) %>% setNames(c('type', 'species', 'jaccard'))
best.jaccard$species_annotated = paste0(best.jaccard$species, '-', paste0('AC-', best.jaccard$type))

rgc.scores.df$keep = TRUE
rgc.scores.df$keep[rgc.scores.df$species_annotated %in% unique(best.jaccard$species_annotated[best.jaccard$jaccard < 0.25])] = FALSE

# Scale such that the average RGC score is 1 and the lowest score equals zero
# rgc.scores.df$RGC.score.scaled = (rgc.scores.df$RGC.score - min(rgc.scores.df$RGC.score))/mean(subset(rgc.scores.df, cell_class == 'RGC')$RGC.score - min(rgc.scores.df$RGC.score))

# Smarter normalization within each species
df.list = split(rgc.scores.df, rgc.scores.df$species)
df.list = lapply(df.list, function(df){
  df$RGC.score.scaled2 = (df$RGC.score - min(df$RGC.score))/mean(subset(df, cell_class == 'RGC')$RGC.score - min(df$RGC.score))
  df
})

rgc.scores.df = do.call(rbind, df.list)

# Transform the significance cutoffs as well
significance = quantile(null.dist$Cluster6, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
significance.scaled = (significance - min(rgc.scores.df$RGC.score))/mean(subset(rgc.scores.df, cell_class == 'RGC')$RGC.score - min(rgc.scores.df$RGC.score))

# Try removing rat

# PrettyBarplot(rgc.scores.df, x = 'annotated', y = 'RGC.score.scaled', add = c('mean_sd')) + 
#   geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.1)+
#   RotatedAxis()

rgc.scores.df$species = factor(factor(rgc.scores.df$species, levels = phylogenetic_order2))
legend = get_legend(PrettyBarplot(subset(rgc.scores.df, keep & cell_class == 'AC'), x = 'annotated', y = 'RGC.score.scaled2', add = c('mean_sd'), facet.by = 'cell_class', scales = "free_x", space = "free") + 
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.5))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = significance.scaled, linetype = 'dashed', alpha = 0.3)+
  # geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed', alpha = 0.3)+
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 1, aes(color = species))+
  scale_color_manual(values = species_palette2)+
  # facet_grid(. ~ cell_class, scales = "free_x", space = "free")
  RotatedAxis() + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank(), legend.position = 'right'))

plot_grid(PrettyBarplot(subset(rgc.scores.df, keep & cell_class == 'BC'), x = 'annotated', y = 'RGC.score.scaled2', add = c('mean_sd'), facet.by = 'cell_class', scales = "free_x", space = "free") + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = significance.scaled, linetype = 'dashed', alpha = 0.3)+
  # geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed', alpha = 0.3)+
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 1, aes(color = species))+
  scale_color_manual(values = species_palette2)+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.5))+
  NoLegend()+
  # facet_grid(. ~ cell_class, scales = "free_x", space = "free")
  RotatedAxis(), 
  PrettyBarplot(subset(rgc.scores.df, keep & cell_class == 'AC'), x = 'annotated', y = 'RGC.score.scaled2', add = c('mean_sd'), facet.by = 'cell_class', scales = "free_x", space = "free") + 
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.5))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = significance.scaled, linetype = 'dashed', alpha = 0.3)+
  # geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed', alpha = 0.3)+
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 1, aes(color = species))+
  scale_color_manual(values = species_palette2)+
  NoLegend()+
  # facet_grid(. ~ cell_class, scales = "free_x", space = "free")
  RotatedAxis() + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank()), 
  PrettyBarplot(subset(rgc.scores.df, keep & cell_class == 'RGC'), x = 'annotated', y = 'RGC.score.scaled2', add = c('mean_sd'), facet.by = 'cell_class', scales = "free_x", space = "free") + 
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.5))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = significance.scaled, linetype = 'dashed', alpha = 0.3)+
  # geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed', alpha = 0.3)+
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 1, aes(color = species))+
  scale_color_manual(values = species_palette2)+
  # facet_grid(. ~ cell_class, scales = "free_x", space = "free")
  RotatedAxis() + 
  NoLegend()+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank()), 
  legend,
  nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 2.3, 1.3, 0.4), align = 'h', axis = 'bt')
ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/rgc-scores-species.pdf', height = 5, width = 18)

# No color
plot_grid(PrettyBarplot(subset(rgc.scores.df, keep & cell_class == 'BC'), x = 'annotated', y = 'RGC.score.scaled2', add = c('mean_sd'), facet.by = 'cell_class', scales = "free_x", space = "free", width = 1) + 
  labs(y = 'Normalized RGC score')+
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25), expand = expansion(mult = c(0,0))) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.18))+
  NoLegend()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank()),
  PrettyBarplot(subset(rgc.scores.df, keep & cell_class == 'AC'), x = 'annotated', y = 'RGC.score.scaled2', add = c('mean_sd'), facet.by = 'cell_class', scales = "free_x", space = "free", width = 1) + 
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25), expand = expansion(mult = c(0,0))) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 10.5, linetype = '22', color = 'black')+
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.18))+
    NoLegend()+
    RotatedXAxis() + 
     theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank()), 
  PrettyBarplot(subset(rgc.scores.df, keep & cell_class == 'RGC'), x = 'annotated', y = 'RGC.score.scaled2', add = c('mean_sd'), facet.by = 'cell_class', scales = "free_x", space = "free", width = 1) + 
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25), expand = expansion(mult = c(0,0))) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.18))+
  RotatedXAxis() + 
  NoLegend()+    
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank()), 
  NULL,
  nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1.2, 2.3, 1.3, 0.1), align = 'h', axis = 'bt') 
ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/rgc-scores-grey-nolabels.pdf', height = 2.6, width = 7)

# rgc.scores.df$annotated = ExtractString(rgc.scores.df$species_annotated, before = '-')
subset(rgc.scores.df, annotated == 'AC-37') %>% arrange(species)
saveRDS(rgc.scores.df, '../../Ortho_Objects/rgc.scores.df.v2.rds')
```

## Boxplot: gaba vs gly

```{r, fig.height=3, fig.width=3}
rgc.scores.df = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/rgc.scores.df.v2.rds')
rgc.scores.df$type = ExtractString(rgc.scores.df$annotated, before = '-')
rgc.scores.df$classification = bc.ac.rgc.ortho$classification[match(rgc.scores.df$annotated, bc.ac.rgc.ortho$annotated)]
head(rgc.scores.df)

# PrettyBoxplot2(rgc.scores.df, x = 'classification', y = 'RGC.score.scaled', color = 'classification')
PrettyBoxplot2(rgc.scores.df, x = 'classification', y = 'RGC.score.scaled2', color = 'classification')

# Average for each type across species
avg.scores = aggregate(RGC.score.scaled2 ~ annotated, data = rgc.scores.df, FUN = mean)
avg.scores$classification = bc.ac.rgc.ortho$classification[match(avg.scores$annotated, bc.ac.rgc.ortho$annotated)]
avg.scores

saveRDS(avg.scores, '../../Ortho_Objects/avg.scores.rds')

library(ggsignif)
PrettyBoxplot2(avg.scores, x = 'classification', y = 'RGC.score.scaled2', color = 'classification')+
  stat_signif(comparisons = list(c("GABA", "Gly")), test = 'wilcox.test', map_signif_level = FALSE, colour = 'black')+
  coord_cartesian(clip = 'off')
ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/rgc-score-classification-boxplot.pdf', height=3, width=3)
```

## Correlation with displacement and polyaxonality

```{r, fig.height=3.5, fig.width=7}
ac.ortho = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
avg.scores = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/avg.scores.rds')

prop.meta = Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type', 'prop.displaced')
# rgc.scores.df$prop.displaced = prop.meta$prop.displaced[match(rgc.scores.df$type, prop.meta$type)]
avg.scores$type = ExtractString(avg.scores$annotated, before = '-')
avg.scores$prop.displaced = prop.meta$prop.displaced[match(avg.scores$type, prop.meta$type)]
avg.scores$polyaxonal.score = MeanMetadata(ac.ortho, 'type', 'axon.module1')[avg.scores$type]
avg.scores$orthotype = orthotype_labels(avg.scores$type)
avg.scores$label = gsub(' ', '\n', orthotype_labels(avg.scores$type))

ScatterPlot(subset(avg.scores, classification %in% c('GABA', 'Gly') & orthotype != 'oAC25'), fill = 'orthotype', 
            'RGC.score.scaled2', 'prop.displaced', xlab = 'Mean RGC score', ylab = 'Proportion displaced',
            labels = 'label', max.overlaps = 10, label.size = 2.5, lm = TRUE, r_pval = TRUE, 
            label.x.npc = 0.55, label.y.npc = 1) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = lighten(type_cols3, 0.3))+
  theme_cowplot() + 
  NoLegend() |
ScatterPlot(subset(avg.scores, classification %in% c('GABA', 'Gly')), fill = 'orthotype', 
            'RGC.score.scaled2', 'polyaxonal.score', xlab = 'Mean RGC score', ylab = 'Polyaxonality score',
            labels = 'label', max.overlaps = 10, label.size = 2.5, lm = TRUE, r_pval = TRUE, 
            label.x.npc = 0.6, label.y.npc = 1) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = lighten(type_cols3, 0.3))+
  theme_cowplot()+
   NoLegend()

ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/rgc-scores-displacement-polyaxonality.pdf', height=3.7, width=7.2)
```

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=5}
# What if we remove the RGC module genes from the axon module? 
# ac.ortho = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
gene2go = fread('../../reference_files/human_gene2go_symbol.csv')
axon.genes = unique(gene2go$Symbol[gene2go$GoID == 'GO:0030424'])
axon.genes

de_list = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/conserved.major.class.genes.list.rds')
VennDiagram(axon.genes, de_list$RGC) # Only 11 genes in common in the first place

# Slow
ac.ortho = AddModuleScore(ac.ortho, features = list(intersect(setdiff(axon.genes, de_list$RGC), rownames(ac.ortho))), name = 'axon.module.no.rgc')
avg.scores$polyaxonal.score.2 = MeanMetadata(ac.ortho, 'type', 'axon.module.no.rgc1')[avg.scores$type]
ScatterPlot(subset(avg.scores, classification %in% c('GABA', 'Gly')), 
            'RGC.score.scaled', 'polyaxonal.score.2', xlab = 'RGC score', ylab = 'Axon module score',
            labels = 'type', max.overlaps = 10, label.size = 2) # Still R = 0.6 when removing the intersection

# Weaker correlation between polyaxonality and displacement, however
ScatterPlot(subset(avg.scores, classification %in% c('GABA', 'Gly')), 
            'prop.displaced', 'polyaxonal.score', 
            labels = 'type', max.overlaps = 10, label.size = 2, lm = TRUE, r_pval = TRUE)
```

## Divergence analysis

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=4}
# PlotDivergenceFinal()
# ggsave('figures/rgc-divergence.pdf')

# avg.pc = readRDS('divergence/traditional-pca.rds')
avg.pc = readRDS('divergence/traditional-pca-v7.rds')
cor.res = readRDS('divergence/cor.res.rds')

# cor.res$metrics$species = factor(cor.res$metrics$species, levels = rev(unique(cor.res$metrics$species)))
summary.pca = reshape2::melt(avg.pc$metrics$`3`[,c('species', 'gaba.rgc.norm.gaba.bc', 'gly.rgc.norm.gaba.bc')]) %>% 
  setNames(c('Species', 'Subclass', 'Divergence'))
summary.pca$Species = species_names_pretty(summary.pca$Species)
summary.pca$Species = factor(factor(summary.pca$Species, levels = (species.names.pretty)))
summary.cor = reshape2::melt(cor.res$metrics[,c('species', 'gaba.rgc.norm.gaba.bc', 'gly.rgc.norm.gaba.bc')]) %>% 
  setNames(c('Species', 'Subclass', 'Divergence'))
summary.cor$Species = species_names_pretty(summary.cor$Species)
summary.cor$Species = factor(factor(summary.cor$Species, levels = (species.names.pretty)))

# Bootstrap percentile CI for each group
divergence_bar_plot = function(data, fill, title, ylab, return.data = FALSE){
  boot_ci <- data  %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(
    Divergence = list(Divergence),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    boot = purrr::map(Divergence, sort),
    ci_low  = purrr::map_dbl(Divergence, ~ quantile(.x, 0.025)),
    ci_high = purrr::map_dbl(Divergence, ~ quantile(.x, 0.975)),
    mean    = purrr::map_dbl(Divergence, mean)
  )
  
  mean.lamprey = mean(subset(boot_ci, Species %in% c('Lamprey'))$mean)
  mean.basal = mean(subset(boot_ci, Species %in% c('Lamprey', 'Cat shark'))$mean)
  mean.no.lamprey = mean(subset(boot_ci, !Species %in% c('Lamprey'))$mean)
  mean.no.basal = mean(subset(boot_ci, !Species %in% c('Lamprey', 'Cat shark'))$mean)
  print(mean.no.lamprey)
  print(mean.no.basal)
  
  # Stats wilcox and t test fail due to only one sample in lamprey
  # print(t.test(mean.lamprey, mean.no.lamprey))
  # print(t.test(mean.basal, mean.no.basal))
  
  if(return.data) return(boot_ci)
  
  ggplot(boot_ci, aes(x = Species, y = mean))+
      geom_col(fill = fill, color = 'black', position = position_dodge(0.7)) + 
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), width = 0.2)+
      # geom_hline(yintercept = c(median.no.lamprey, median.no.basal), linetype = 'dashed', color = 'grey')+
      theme_cowplot() + 
      NoLegend()+
      coord_flip()+
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 2), position = "right", expand = expansion(mult = c(0,0)), limits = c(0,1.1))+
      ylab(ylab)+
      labs(caption = title)+
      theme(axis.title.x = element_text(), axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
            plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15))
}

divergence_bar_plot(subset(summary.pca, Subclass == 'gaba.rgc.norm.gaba.bc'), 'cyan', 'GABAergic', 
                    '                          RGC-AC distance') |
divergence_bar_plot(subset(summary.pca, Subclass == 'gly.rgc.norm.gaba.bc'), 'cyan4', 'Glycinergic', '') +
   theme(axis.text.y = element_blank()) 

# divergence_bar_plot(subset(summary.cor, Subclass == 'gaba.rgc.norm.gaba.bc'), 'deeppink', 'gabaAC', '                       RGC similarity (z-difference)') +
#   theme(axis.text.y = element_blank()) |
# divergence_bar_plot(subset(summary.cor, Subclass == 'gly.rgc.norm.gaba.bc'), 'orange', 'glyAC', '') +
#   theme(axis.text.y = element_blank())

ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/rgc-ac-pca-distance-3pcs.pdf', height=4, width=4)
```

```{r}
#' Stats for gaba is significant for lamprey, almost for shark

df = as.data.frame(divergence_bar_plot(
  subset(summary.pca, Subclass == 'gaba.rgc.norm.gaba.bc'), 'deeppink', 'gabaAC', 
                    '                          RGC-AC distance', return.data = TRUE))
rownames(df) = df$Species
df$lamprey <- as.numeric(df$Species %in% c('Lamprey'))
df$basal <- as.numeric(df$Species %in% c('Lamprey', 'Catshark'))

dendro = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/phylo.hs.pm.sorted.dendro.rds')
# pruned = prune(dendro, setdiff(labels(dendro), levels(summary.cor$Species)))
tree = as.phylo(dendro)
plot(tree)
tree$tip.label = species_names_pretty(tree$tip.label)
pruned = drop.tip(tree, setdiff(tree$tip.label, df$Species))
plot(pruned)

library(phylolm)
fit <- phylolm(
  mean ~ lamprey,
  data = df,
  phy = pruned,
  model = "lambda"   # or "BM"
)
summary(fit)

fit <- phylolm(
  mean ~ basal,
  data = df,
  phy = pruned,
  model = "lambda"   # or "BM"
)
summary(fit)
```

```{r}
)
```

Overview of the atlases for the new species

```{r, fig.height=37, fig.width=30, eval = FALSE}
objectList = list()
objectList$MouseLemur = OnOffBcClassification(readRDS('../../Full_Objects/MouseLemur_full_v2.rds'), cutoff = 20, plot = FALSE) 
objectList$Rat = OnOffBcClassification(readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Rat_full_v2.rds'), cutoff = 20) 
objectList$Axolotl = OnOffBcClassification(readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Axolotl_full_v3.rds'), 'ISL1', plot = FALSE, cutoff = 5)
objectList$Newt = OnOffBcClassification(readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Newt_full_v3.rds'), 'ISL1', plot = FALSE, cutoff = 5)
objectList = lapply(objectList, OrderAnnotated)

objectList$Axolotl$animal = objectList$Axolotl$batch

# Dot plots
plt.list = lapply(names(objectList), function(species){
  print(species)
  TitlePlot(AnnotatedUmap(objectList[[species]],
              annotation = major_annotation_pr_gaba_gly_on_off,
              group.by = 'annotated',
              umap.group.by = 'cell_class2',
              color.clusters.by = 'cell_class2', 
              umap.legend = TRUE, 
              rel_widths = c(1,4),
              title = species, 
              plot.proportions = FALSE,
              return.list = FALSE, 
              label = FALSE, 
              plot.umap = FALSE), 
            species) + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30), axis.title.x = element_blank())
  })

# UMAPs
objectList$MouseLemur$cell_class2 = factor(objectList$MouseLemur$cell_class2, levels = unique(Annotation(major_annotation_pr_gaba_gly_on_off)))
umap.list = lapply(names(objectList), function(species){
  PrettyUmap2(objectList[[species]], group.by = 'cell_class2', 
              pt.alpha = 0.5, 
              cols = AnnotationColors(major_annotation_pr_gaba_gly_on_off), 
              title = species, 
              label = FALSE, 
              show.legend = TRUE,
              rasterise = TRUE,
              # pt.size = 0.1, 
              size = 8) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30), axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20))
})

plot_grid(ggarrange(plotlist = umap.list, common.legend = TRUE, legend = 'right', nrow = 1, labels = LETTERS[1:4], font.label = list(size = 35, fontface = 'bold')), 
          #nrow = 1, labels = LETTERS[1:4], label_size = 35, label_fontface = 'bold'), 
          ggarrange(plotlist = plt.list, ncol = 1, common.legend = TRUE, legend = 'right', labels = LETTERS[5:8], font.label = list(size = 35, fontface = 'bold')), 
          ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1,5))

ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/fig-new-species-atlases.pdf', height=37, width=30)
```

# Figure S2

## Harmony integration

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=16}
vertebrateAC = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_v2_100.rds')
ac.ortho$orthotype = orthotype_labels(ac.ortho$type)
vertebrateAC = MapBack(vertebrateAC, ac.ortho, group.by = 'orthotype')
vertebrateAC = MapBack(vertebrateAC, ac.ortho, group.by = 'orthotype.no')
vertebrateAC.harmony = Harmonize(vertebrateAC, 
                                 batch = 'species', # integrate by species
                                 lambda = 1e-4, # strong integration
                                 nPCs = 60, # need more PCs, otherwise you get a big blob
                                 cluster_resolution = 1.2 # retrieve many clusters
                                 )
DimPlot(vertebrateAC.harmony, group.by = 'species') | DimPlotLabeled(vertebrateAC.harmony, group.by = 'dendro.order')
vertebrateAC.harmony = FindClusters(vertebrateAC.harmony, resolution = 1.0)

# Plot
plot_grid(
  PrettyUmap2(vertebrateAC, group.by = 'orthotype.no', cols = lighten(type_cols4.no, 0.3), title = 'Seurat CCA integration', pt.size = 0.5), 
  PrettyUmap2(vertebrateAC.harmony, group.by = 'orthotype.no', angle = pi, cols = lighten(type_cols4.no, 0.3), 
              title = 'Harmony integration', pt.size = 0.5) + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()), 
  JSHeatmap2(vertebrateAC.harmony$seurat_clusters, vertebrateAC.harmony$orthotype.no, xlab = 'Seurat orthotypes', ylab = 'Harmony orthotypes'), 
  nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1,1,1.7), align = 'h', axis = 'bt')

ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/fig-harmony-integration.pdf', height=5, width=16)
```

Add ferret sacs posthoc

```{r}
ac.ortho = LoadACOrtho()
WhichCells(ac.ortho, expr = species == 'Ferret' & species_littype == 'SAC')
ac.ortho@meta.data[WhichCells(PositiveCell(subset(ac.ortho, species == 'Ferret'), features = 'SLC5A7', return.object = TRUE), expr = positive),'species_littype'] = 'SAC'
WhichCells(ac.ortho, expr = species == 'Ferret' & species_littype == 'SAC') # 8 cells, 7 of which are in the SAC oAC

saveRDS(ac.ortho, '../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
```

```{r, fig.height=3, fig.width=10}
ac.ortho = LoadACOrtho()

# Calculate stats in each species separately
overstats = do.call(rbind, lapply(speciesList.liz, function(this.species){
  object = subset(ac.ortho, species == this.species)
  OverlapStatistics(table(object$type, object$species_type2))
}))

# Check that col.norm.prop equals 1 for a species type
subset(overstats, ident2 == 'Human-1')$col.norm.prop  %>% sum
saveRDS(overstats, '../../Ortho_Objects/overstats.rds')

tabulations = lapply(speciesList.liz, function(this.species){
  object = subset(ac.ortho, species == this.species)
  addmargins(table(object$type, object$species_type2))
})

# Create workbook and write each data frame to a separate sheet
wb <- createWorkbook()

for (sheet_name in names(tabulations)) {
  addWorksheet(wb, sheet_name)
  writeData(wb, sheet_name, tabulations[[sheet_name]])
}

# Save the Excel file
saveWorkbook(wb, "../../Ortho_Objects/table-tabulations.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
```


```{r, fig.height=3, fig.width=10}
overstats = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/overstats.rds')

# A17 matches
a17.overstats = subset(overstats, ident1 %in% c('30_A17', '32_A17') & overlap > 10 & padj < 1e-10)
a17.overstats

# nn_matrix = JSMatrix(table(ac.ortho$type, ac.ortho$species_type2))[c('30_A17', '32_A17'), a17.overstats$ident2]
nn_matrix <- reshape2::dcast(a17.overstats[,c('ident1', 'ident2', 'jaccard')], ident1 ~ ident2)
nn_matrix[is.na(nn_matrix)] = 0
rownames(nn_matrix) = nn_matrix$ident1
nn_matrix = nn_matrix[,-1]

rownames(nn_matrix) = orthotype_labels(rownames(nn_matrix))
colnames(nn_matrix) = ExtractString(colnames(nn_matrix), after = '_')
# JSHeatmap(as.table(as.matrix(nn_matrix)), row.order = unique(a17.overstats$ident1), column.order = unique(a17.overstats$ident2)) + 
#   xlab(NULL)+
#   ArialFont()+
#   theme(plot.margin = unit(c(1,1,1,1),"cm"))+
#   ylab('Orthotype')

column.order = c(names(which(apply(nn_matrix, 2, which.max) == 1)), names(which(apply(nn_matrix, 2, which.max) == 2)))
JSHeatmap(as.table(as.matrix(nn_matrix)), column.order = column.order) + 
  xlab(NULL)+
  ArialFont()+
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(2,1,2,1),"cm"))+
  ylab('Orthotype')

ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/figS_A17_jaccard.pdf', height=3, width=10)
```

# Figure S4: oAC correspondences across species

```{r, fig.height=34, fig.width=25}
nTypes.df = readRDS('metadata/nTypes.df.rds')
speciesList = levels(ac.ortho$species)
# tableList = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/tableList.rds')
ncells = nTypes.df$nCells[match(speciesList, nTypes.df$species)] %>% setNames(speciesList)

plt.list <- lapply(levels(ac.ortho$species), function(this.species) {
  obj <- subset(ac.ortho, species == this.species)
  
  # Make 1-based for species clusters
  obj$species_cluster = as.numeric(obj$species_cluster)+1 #RenumberClustering(obj$species_cluster, zero.base = FALSE)
  TitlePlot(
    JSHeatmap2(obj$orthotype, obj$species_cluster, row.order = levels(obj$orthotype)),
    paste0(
      this.species,
      ' (', 
      comma(ncells[[this.species]]),
      ' cells; ARI = ',
      round(adj.rand.index(obj$orthotype, obj$species_cluster), 2),  # optional rounding digits
      ')'
    )
  ) + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20))
})

ggarrange(plotlist = plt.list, ncol = 3, nrow = 6, common.legend = TRUE, legend = 'right')
ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/figS4-jaccard-tight-labeled-2.pdf', height=34, width=26)
```

# Figure S8: oAC presence


## Null distribution and p-value computation

```{r, fig.height=2, fig.width=3}
overstats = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/overstats.rds')
null.dist.data = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/js.null.dist.data.rds')

overstats$lit_type = ExtractString(overstats$ident2, before = '_')
overstats$lit_type[!overstats$lit_type %in% c('SAC', 'A2', 'VG3')] = NA
observed.jaccard = rbind(subset(overstats, ident1 == '22_A2' & lit_type == 'A2'), 
                         subset(overstats, ident1 == '8_SAC*' & lit_type == 'SAC'), 
                         subset(overstats, ident1 == '27_VG3' & lit_type == 'VG3'))

PrettyHistogram2(observed.jaccard$jaccard, 
                 null.dist.data$max.jaccard, 
                 # bins = 20,
                 vline = c(0.25, 0.4), 
                 name1 = 'Observed', 
                 name2 = 'Null', 
                 xlab = 'Jaccard index') +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('grey', 'deeppink')) + 
  ArialFont()+
  LegendLowerRight(x = 0.9, y = 0.5)

ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/figS_js-null-dist.pdf', height = 2, width = 3)

# hist(observed.jaccard$jaccard)

# FDR = 1 - precision
AUPRC(null.dist.data$max.jaccard, observed.jaccard$jaccard, values.check = seq(0, 1, by = 0.05), plot = TRUE)

# p-values
quantile(null.dist.data$max.jaccard, probs = c(0.75, 0.8, 0.9, 0.95))
```

## Presence heatmap

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=8}
best.jaccard = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/best.jaccard.matrix.rds')
dend_custom_order = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/ac.dendrogram.v2.rds')
phylo = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/phylo.hs.liz.rds')

# Bin the heatmap
discrete_bins <- function(x) {
  cut(x,
      breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.4, 1), #0.6, 0.8, 1),
      labels = c("FDR > 0.1", "FDR < 0.1", "FDR < 0.05"),#, "red", "darkred"),
      include.lowest = TRUE)
}

binned_mat <- matrix(discrete_bins(best.jaccard), nrow = nrow(best.jaccard))
rownames(binned_mat) <- rownames(best.jaccard)
colnames(binned_mat) <- colnames(best.jaccard)

# Column annotations (number of unenriched cells)
enrichment.tabulation = read.csv('../../Ortho_Objects/enrichment.tabulation.csv', row.names = 1)
unenriched.cells = (enrichment.tabulation$CD73. + enrichment.tabulation$NONE)
n.cells = rowSums(enrichment.tabulation)
top_anno = HeatmapAnnotation(`Number of \ncells` = anno_barplot(log10(n.cells+1), gp = gpar(fill = 'grey', col = 'grey'), bar_width = 0.8, baseline = 2, ylim = c(2,5),
                                                                axis_param = list(side = "left",             # or "top", "left", etc.
                                                                                  at = c(2,3,4),            # tick positions
                                                                                  labels = expression(NA, 10^3, 10^4),  # custom labels
                                                                                  gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, col = "black", fontfamily = 'ArialMT')  # text formatting
                                                                                )), 
                             `Number of \nunenriched cells` = anno_barplot(log10(unenriched.cells+1), gp = gpar(fill = 'black'), bar_width = 0.8, 
                                                                         baseline = 0, ylim = c(0,4.5), 
                                                                axis_param = list(side = "left",             # or "top", "left", etc.
                                                                                  at = c(0,2,4),            # tick positions
                                                                                  labels = expression(NA, 10^2, 10^4),  # custom labels
                                                                                  gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, col = "black", fontfamily = 'ArialMT')  # text formatting
                                                                                ))
)
                             

# Row annotations (number of species present, estimated frequency, fold depletion index)
ac.unenriched = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-unenriched.rds')
ac.enriched = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-all.rds')
bestMatchDf = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/best-jaccard.rds')
n.present = apply(select(bestMatchDf, -OrthoType), 1, function(x) length(which(x > JACCARD.CUTOFF)))
ac.ortho$n.present.10 = n.present[match(ac.ortho$type, names(n.present))]
n.present = apply(select(bestMatchDf, -OrthoType), 1, function(x) length(which(x > 0.4)))
ac.ortho$n.present.05 = n.present[match(ac.ortho$type, names(n.present))]

# Subcluster score
simpson_df = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/simpson-index.rds')[,-1] #
simpson_df = simpson_df[,levels(ac.ortho$type_unordered)]
# tabulation = table(ac.ortho$species, ac.ortho$type)
simpson_df[t(best.jaccard) < JACCARD.CUTOFF] = NA # Remove outliers

right_anno <- rowAnnotation(
  `\n\nSpecies\n< 0.10` = anno_barplot(Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'n.present.10')$n.present, 
                                     gp = gpar(
                                       fill = 'cyan3', #AcPalette3(5)[[5]], 
                                       col = 'cyan3'), #AcPalette3(5)[[5]]), 
                                     bar_width = 0.8, baseline = 0),
  `Species\n< 0.05` = anno_barplot(Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'n.present.05')$n.present, 
                                     gp = gpar(
                                       fill = '#584B9FFF', #AcPalette3(5)[[5]], 
                                       col = '#584B9FFF'), #AcPalette3(5)[[5]]), 
                                     bar_width = 0.8, baseline = 0),
  `\n\nObserved\nfrequency` = anno_boxplot(t(ac.enriched), axis = TRUE, gp = gpar(fill = "white", col = 'darkgrey'), pt_gp = gpar(col = 'darkgrey')),
  `Unenriched\nfrequency` = anno_boxplot(t(ac.unenriched), axis = TRUE, gp = gpar(fill = "white", col = 'black')),
  `\n\nNumber\nof subtypes` = anno_boxplot(simpson_df, axis = TRUE, gp = gpar(fill = "white", col = 'grey20'), ylim = c(1,5.7), size = unit(0,'cm'), axis_param = list(side = "bottom", at = c(1,2,3,4,5), labels = c('', '   2', '','  4',''))),
  `Proportion\ndisplaced` = anno_barplot(Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'prop.displaced')$prop.displaced, bar_width = 0.8, gp = gpar(fill = 'white')),
  border = TRUE,
  annotation_legend_param = list(title_gp = gpar(fontfamily = 'ArialMT', fontsize = 1)),
  show_legend = TRUE, 
  annotation_width = list(
    `\n\n#\nspecies\n< 0.10`= unit(3, "cm"),
    `#\nspecies\n< 0.05`= unit(3, "cm"),
    `\n\n\nObserved\nfrequency`= unit(3, "cm"),
    `True\nfrequency`= unit(3, "cm"),
    `\n\n#\nsubtypes` = unit(3, "cm"),
    `Proportion\ndisplaced` = unit(3, "cm"))
)

left_anno <- rowAnnotation(
  `Classification` = Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'classification')$classification,
  border = TRUE,
  col = list(Classification = AcPalette3(2) %>% setNames(c('GABA', 'Gly'))), 
  annotation_legend_param = list(title_gp = gpar(fontfamily = 'ArialMT')),
  show_legend = FALSE
)

# Define colors for levels
col_fun <- c(
  `FDR > 0.1` = "white",
  `FDR < 0.1` = "cyan3",
  `FDR < 0.05` = "#584B9FFF"
  # red = "red",
  # darkred = "darkred"
)

# Fold enrichment
prop.unenriched = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-unenriched.rds')
prop.all = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-all.rds')
colnames(prop.unenriched) = gsub('33_CA1', '33_CA1*', gsub('40', '40*', colnames(prop.unenriched)))
colnames(prop.all) = gsub('33_CA1', '33_CA1*', gsub('40', '40*', colnames(prop.all)))
common.species = intersect(rownames(prop.unenriched), rownames(prop.all))
fc.matrix = log2(prop.all[common.species,]/(prop.unenriched[common.species,]))

ht1 = Heatmap2(t(fc.matrix), 
               legend.name = 'Cell type\nenrichment\n(log2 fold)',
               col = colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c('deepskyblue', 'white', 'deeppink')), 
               rect_gp = gpar(col = 'grey', lwd = 0.1),
               cluster_rows = dend_custom_order, 
               row_names_side = 'left', 
               left_annotation = left_anno, 
               row.font.size = 10)

ht2 = Heatmap2(binned_mat,
         row_names_side = 'left',
         legend.name = 'Presence',
         col = col_fun, #c('white', '#584B9FFF'),
         # row_split = 1:42,
         rect_gp = gpar(col = 'grey', lwd = 0.1),
         cluster_rows = dend_custom_order, 
         # cluster_columns = phylo,
         column_dend_reorder = FALSE,
         right_annotation = right_anno,
         top_annotation = top_anno,
         row.font.size = 10)

pdf('../../figures/my_figs/fig5-conservation.pdf', height=8.5, width=11, family = 'ArialMT')
ht_list = ht1 + ht2
draw(ht_list)
dev.off()
```

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=9}
ac.enriched = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-all-FDR-0.01.rds')

# Subcluster score

# tabulation = table(ac.ortho$species, ac.ortho$type)

right_anno <- rowAnnotation(
  `\nSpecies\n< 0.10` = anno_barplot(Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'n.present.10')$n.present, 
                                     gp = gpar(
                                       fill = 'grey', #AcPalette3(5)[[5]], 
                                       col = 'grey'), #AcPalette3(5)[[5]]), 
                                     bar_width = 0.8, baseline = 0),
  # `Species\n< 0.05` = anno_barplot(Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'n.present.05')$n.present,

  `\n\nObserved\nfrequency` = anno_boxplot(t(ac.enriched), axis = TRUE, gp = gpar(fill = "white", col = 'grey20'), pt_gp = gpar(col = 'grey20')),
  `Unenriched\nfrequency` = anno_boxplot(t(ac.unenriched), axis = TRUE, gp = gpar(fill = "white", col = 'grey20')),
  `\n\nNumber of\nspecies types` = anno_boxplot(simpson_df, axis = TRUE, gp = gpar(fill = "white", col = 'grey20'), ylim = c(1,5.7), size = unit(0,'cm'), axis_param = list(side = "bottom", at = c(1,2,3,4,5), labels = c('', '   2', '','  4',''))),
  `Proportion\ndisplaced` = anno_barplot(Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'prop.displaced')$prop.displaced, bar_width = 0.8, gp = gpar(fill = 'white')),
  border = TRUE,
  annotation_legend_param = list(title_gp = gpar(fontfamily = 'ArialMT', fontsize = 1)),
  show_legend = TRUE, 
  annotation_width = list(
    `\n\n#\nspecies\n< 0.10`= unit(3, "cm"),
    `#\nspecies\n< 0.05`= unit(3, "cm"),
    `\n\n\nObserved\nfrequency`= unit(3, "cm"),
    `True\nfrequency`= unit(3, "cm"),
    # `\n\n#\nspeciestypes` = unit(3, "cm"),
    `Proportion\ndisplaced` = unit(3, "cm"))
)

left_anno <- rowAnnotation(
  `Classification` = Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'classification')$classification,
  border = TRUE,
  col = list(Classification = c('cyan', 'cyan4') %>% setNames(c('GABA', 'Gly'))), 
  annotation_legend_param = list(title_gp = gpar(fontfamily = 'ArialMT')),
  show_legend = FALSE
)

# Define colors for levels
col_fun <- c(
  `FDR > 0.1` = "white",
  `FDR < 0.1` = "orange",
  `FDR < 0.05` = "deeppink"
  # red = "red",
  # darkred = "darkred"
)

# Fold enrichment
prop.unenriched = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-unenriched.rds')
prop.all = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-all.rds')
colnames(prop.unenriched) = gsub('33_CA1', '33_CA1*', gsub('40', '40*', colnames(prop.unenriched)))
colnames(prop.all) = gsub('33_CA1', '33_CA1*', gsub('40', '40*', colnames(prop.all)))
common.species = intersect(rownames(prop.unenriched), rownames(prop.all))
fc.matrix = log2(prop.all[common.species,]/(prop.unenriched[common.species,]))

# ht1 = Heatmap2(t(fc.matrix), 
#                legend.name = 'Cell type\nenrichment\n(log2 fold)',
#                col = colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c('deepskyblue', 'white', 'deeppink')), 
#                rect_gp = gpar(col = 'grey', lwd = 0.1),
#                cluster_rows = dend_custom_order, 
#                row_names_side = 'left', 
#                left_annotation = left_anno, 
#                row.font.size = 10)

ht2 = Heatmap2(binned_mat,
         row_names_side = 'left',
         legend.name = 'Presence',
         col = col_fun, #c('white', '#584B9FFF'),
         # row_split = 1:42,
         rect_gp = gpar(col = 'grey', lwd = 0.1),
         cluster_rows = dend_custom_order, 
         row_labels = orthotype_labels(rownames(binned_mat)),
         # cluster_columns = phylo,
         column_dend_reorder = FALSE,
         right_annotation = right_anno,
         left_annotation = left_anno, 
         top_annotation = top_anno,
         width = unit(8, "cm"), 
         row.font.size = 10)

pdf('../../figures/my_figs/fig5-conservation-simple.pdf', height=9, width=10, family = 'ArialMT')
ht2
dev.off()
```

## Correlation between frequency and number of species identified

```{r, fig.height=3.5, fig.width=3.5}
best.jaccard = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/best-jaccard.rds') %>% select(-OrthoType)

# Observed (raw) frequency
ac.enriched = t(as.matrix(readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-all.rds')))
rownames(ac.enriched) = gsub('\\*', '', rownames(ac.enriched))
old.order = rownames(ac.enriched)
ac.enriched = ac.enriched[gsub('\\*', '', rownames(best.jaccard)),]
ac.enriched[best.jaccard < 0.25] = NA
saveRDS(t(ac.enriched[old.order,]), '../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-all-FDR-0.01.rds')

# Unenriched frequency
ac.unenriched = t(as.matrix(readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-unenriched.rds')))
rownames(ac.unenriched) = gsub('\\*', '', rownames(ac.unenriched))
ac.unenriched = ac.unenriched[gsub('\\*', '', rownames(best.jaccard)),]
best.jaccard.subset = best.jaccard[,colnames(ac.unenriched)]
ac.unenriched[best.jaccard.subset < 0.25] = NA
saveRDS(t(ac.unenriched[old.order,]), '../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-unenriched-FDR-0.01.rds')

summary.df = Metadata(ac.ortho, 'orthotype', 'type_unordered', 'n.present.10')
summary.df$observed.frequency.mean = apply(ac.enriched, 1, median, na.rm = TRUE)
summary.df$observed.frequency.sd = apply(ac.enriched, 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
summary.df$observed.frequency.min = summary.df$observed.frequency.mean - summary.df$observed.frequency.sd
summary.df$observed.frequency.max = summary.df$observed.frequency.mean + summary.df$observed.frequency.sd
# summary.df$unenriched.frequency.mean = apply(ac.unenriched, 2, mean)
summary.df$label = gsub(' ', '\n', summary.df$orthotype)

ScatterPlot(summary.df, x = 'n.present.10', y = 'observed.frequency.mean', labels = 'label', max.overlaps = 10, 
            xlab = 'Number of species present (FDR < 0.10)', ylab = 'Observed frequency (median)', lm.color = 'grey', 
            label.size = 2, r_pval = TRUE, label.x.npc = 0.55, label.y.npc = 1) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(floor(min(summary.df$n.present.10)), ceiling(max(summary.df$n.present.10)), by = 5), 
                     minor_breaks = seq(floor(min(summary.df$n.present.10)), ceiling(max(summary.df$n.present.10)), by = 1))+
  # theme(axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "cm"), 
  #       axis.ticks.minor = element_line(colour = "black"))+
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(minor.ticks = TRUE),
    y = guide_axis(minor.ticks = TRUE))
  # geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = observed.frequency.min, ymax = observed.frequency.max), width = 0, alpha = 0.1)+ # Vertical error bars
  # coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 0.08))

# ScatterPlot(summary.df, x = 'n.present.10', y = 'unenriched.frequency.mean', labels = 'type_unordered', max.overlaps = 10, 
            # xlab = 'Number of species present (FDR < 0.10)', ylab = 'Observed frequency') 

ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/figS-presence-frequency-cor.pdf', height = 3.5, width = 3.5)
```

# Summary OT figure

Frequency (based on unenriched batches)
Proportion displaced (based on mouse merfish)
RGC score
Axon module score
Presence score
Subtype score
Dotplot of key genes

```{r, eval = FALSE}
Idents(ac.ortho) = 'type'
ac.ortho$best.marker = best.specificity.score$gene[match(ac.ortho$type_no, best.specificity.score$OT)]
ac.ortho$type_unordered = factor(ac.ortho$type, levels = Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_no', 'type')$type)
ac.ortho$axon.module1 = ac.ortho$Cluster1
saveRDS(ac.ortho, '../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
```

```{r, fig.height=12, fig.width=11}
# ac.ortho = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
ac.unenriched = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-unenriched.rds')
ac.enriched = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-all.rds')

# RGC score
rgc.scores = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/rgc-scores-for-ac.rds')

# Presence score
bestMatchDf = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/best-jaccard.rds')
n.present = apply(select(bestMatchDf, -OrthoType), 1, function(x) length(which(x > 0.2)))
ac.ortho$n.present = n.present[match(ac.ortho$type, names(n.present))]
  
# Subcluster score
simpson_df = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/simpson-index.rds')[,-1]

# Remove outliers
tabulation = table(ac.ortho$species, ac.ortho$type)
simpson_df[tabulation < 10] = NA

# Expression of top conserved marker for each OT
best.specificity.score = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/ac.best.specificity.score.rds')

# Define a boxplot annotation for columns
col_anno <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  `Classification` = Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'classification')$classification,
  `Raw\nfrequency` = anno_boxplot(ac.enriched, axis = TRUE, gp = gpar(fill = "white", col = 'grey20')),
  `Unenriched\nfrequency` = anno_boxplot(ac.unenriched, axis = TRUE, gp = gpar(fill = "white", col = 'grey20')),
  # `nSpecies` = anno_simple(Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'n.present')$n.present, col = colorRamp2(c(7, 17), c("white", AcPalette2()[3])), border = TRUE),
  `Number\nspecies\nfound` = anno_barplot(Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'n.present')$n.present, gp = gpar(fill = AcPalette2()[3])),
  `Number\nsubtypes` = anno_boxplot(simpson_df[,levels(ac.ortho$type_unordered)], axis = TRUE, gp = gpar(fill = "white", col = 'grey20'), ylim = c(1,4), size = unit(0,'cm')),
  `Proportion\ndisplaced` = anno_barplot(Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'prop.displaced')$prop.displaced, gp = gpar(fill = AcPalette2()[5])),
  `Axonal score` = anno_simple(MeanMetadata(ac.ortho, 'type_unordered', 'axon.module1'), col = colorRamp2(c(0.14, 0.23), c("white", 'hotpink')), border = TRUE),
  `RGC score` = anno_simple(matrixStats::colMedians(rgc.scores, na.rm = TRUE),
                              col = colorRampMinMax(matrixStats::colMedians(rgc.scores, na.rm = TRUE), c('white', AcPalette2()[10])), border = TRUE),
  #anno_boxplot(rgc.scores, axis = TRUE, gp = gpar(fill = "white", col = AcPalette2()[10])),
  border = TRUE,
  col = list(Classification = AcPalette2(2) %>% setNames(c('GABA', 'Gly'))), 
  annotation_legend_param = list(title_gp = gpar(fontfamily = 'sans')),
  show_legend = TRUE
)

# Dendro
dend_custom_order = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/ac.dendrogram.v2.rds')

# pdf('../../figures/my_figs/ot-summary-dotplot.pdf', height=12, width=11)
ClusteredDotplot2(ac.ortho,
                  features = best.specificity.score$gene[-23],
                  group.by = 'type_unordered',
                 cluster_rows = FALSE,
                 cluster_columns = dend_custom_order,
                 dot.scale.factor = 0.4, 
                 max.pct = 50,
                 pseudocount = 5, 
                 col.low = 'lightgrey',
                 col.high = '#584B9FFF', 
                 top_annotation = col_anno, 
                 column_names_rot = 45)
# dev.off()
```

SFN figures

```{r, fig.height=3, fig.width=4}
# data
df <- data.frame(
  group = factor(c("PR", "HC", "BC", "AC", "RGC"), levels = c("PR", "HC", "BC", "AC", "RGC")),
  numerator = c(3, 1, 14, 11, 42),
  denominator = c(3, 1, 15, 63, 45)
) %>%
  mutate(Characterized = numerator, 
         Uncharacterized = denominator - numerator)

# reshape for stacked bar
df_long <- df %>%
  # mutate(remaining = 1 - prop) %>%
  select(group, Characterized, Uncharacterized) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(-group, names_to = "type", values_to = "value")

df_long$type = factor(df_long$type, levels = c('Uncharacterized', 'Characterized'))

# plot
plt = ggplot(df_long, aes(x = group, y = value, fill = type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = 'black') +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Characterized" = "deeppink", "Uncharacterized" = "grey80")) +
  ylab("# of cell types") +
  xlab("") +
  ArialFont()+
  theme_minimal()+
  # theme_pubclean()+
  theme(legend.position = 'right')

plt
ggsave('figures/fig-char-bar-graph.pdf')
```

```{r, fig.height=3, fig.width=4}
# data
df <- data.frame(
  group = factor(c("PR", "HC", "BC", "AC", "RGC"), levels = c("PR", "HC", "BC", "AC", "RGC")),
  numerator = c(3, 1, 14, 11, 42),
  denominator = c(3, 1, 15, 63, 45)
) %>%
  mutate(Characterized = numerator, 
         Uncharacterized = denominator - numerator)

# reshape for stacked bar
df_long <- df %>%
  # mutate(remaining = 1 - prop) %>%
  select(group, Characterized, Uncharacterized) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(-group, names_to = "type", values_to = "value")

df_long$type = factor(df_long$type, levels = c('Uncharacterized', 'Characterized'))

# plot
# ggplot(df, aes(x = group, y = denominator)) +
#   geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = 'black', fill = 'darkgrey') +

# plot_grid(get_legend(plt))

  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = 'darkgrey') +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Characterized" = "darkgrey", "Uncharacterized" = "darkgrey"), labels = c('Characterized', 'Uncharacterized')) +
  ylab("# of cell types") +
  xlab("") +
  ArialFont()+

ggsave('figures/fig-char-bar-graph-grey.pdf')
```

# Example jaccard

```{r}
set.seed(42)

n <- 10000

# clust1: 42 clusters, uniform random
clust1 <- sample(1:42, size = n, replace = TRUE)

# clust2: 60 clusters total
# - Clusters 1-10 map nearly perfectly to clust1 clusters 1-10
# - The rest is random noise from clusters 11-60

clust2 <- integer(n)

# For each observation belonging to clust1 clusters 1-10,
# assign it to the matching clust2 cluster with ~95% fidelity,
# and randomly flip to another cluster 11-60 the other ~5%
match_clusters <- 1:10
noise_clusters <- 11:60

for (i in seq_len(n)) {
  if (clust1[i] %in% match_clusters) {
    # ~95% chance: assign to matching cluster in clust2
    # ~5% chance: assign randomly to a noise cluster
    if (runif(1) < 0.2) {
      clust2[i] <- clust1[i]          # perfect match
    } else {
      clust2[i] <- sample(noise_clusters, 1)  # random noise
    }
  } else {
    # clust1 clusters 11-42 → assign randomly across all 60 clust2 clusters
    clust2[i] <- sample(1:60, 1)
  }
}

# Quick sanity check
cat("clust1 unique clusters:", length(unique(clust1)), "\n")
cat("clust2 unique clusters:", length(unique(clust2)), "\n")
cat("\nOverlap for matched clusters (should be ~95% of clust1's count):\n")
for (k in match_clusters) {
  n_in_clust1 <- sum(clust1 == k)
  n_matched   <- sum(clust1 == k & clust2 == k)
  cat(sprintf("  Cluster %2d: clust1 n = %4d, matched in clust2 = %4d (%.1f%%)\n",
              k, n_in_clust1, n_matched, 100 * n_matched / n_in_clust1))
}
```

```{r, fig.height=3.1, fig.width=2.1}
  NoLegend() + theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
                     axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
                     axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
                     axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), 
                     axis.ticks.y = element_blank()), 
  'Weak')

TitlePlot(JSHeatmap2(clust1, clust1, row.order = sample(1:42), border.col = NA) + 
  NoLegend() + theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
                     axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
                     axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
                     axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), 
                     axis.ticks.y = element_blank()), 
  'Perfect')
```
